response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role targets a Director-level individual contributor Principal Engineer with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows ~14 years of professional experience post-2012, no demonstrated AI/ML platforms or products, no cloud-platform strategy work, and only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling. There is no evidence of director-level influence, recognized AI thought leadership, or advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded
Long-running founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial initiative
Active community contributor with workshops, talks, and OSS libraries
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Lacks director-level scope, strategy work, or executive customer advisory experience
Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage, not platform-level strategy

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs Director-level IC scope
